summary: TermuxAI new features fully tested and working: Session persistence (saves terminal buffer to MongoDB every 30s), File browser tab with full CRUD operations, and APK packaging configuration. All 17 backend tests passed (100%), frontend UI fully functional with 4 tabs.
critical_code_review_comments: File management APIs have proper error handling and security (blocked /proc, /sys, /dev)
Session persistence implemented with periodic save (30s) and manual save endpoint
Frontend uses proper React Native components (View, Text, TouchableOpacity)
All interactive elements use appropriate testID attributes
Mobile-first design with proper touch targets and spacing
File browser shows file icons, sizes, and proper navigation breadcrumbs
seed_data_creation: Test files created in /tmp during testing (TEST_new_file.txt, TEST_new_directory, TEST_file_to_delete.txt) - automatically cleaned up
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features tested and working. Session persistence saves terminal buffer to MongoDB collection 'terminal_session' every 30 seconds. File browser starts at /app by default. 4 tabs navigation working (Terminal, Agent, Files, Settings). APK packaging configured via eas.json with development, preview, and production builds.
